top_tweets.text:
"Engineering, product, and design are all merging into a 'builder' role"

Yeah... I'm not so sure. This feels like an oversimplification and podcast talking point. Reality is a lot more complex.

Even with 1000 "Member of Technical Staff" titles, someone still has to wake up and
top_tweets.author: leerob
top_tweets.name: Lee Robinson
top_tweets.summary_zh: 質疑「工程、產品、設計正在合併為單一 builder 角色」的論點，認為這是過度簡化的說法，實際分工仍然複雜且必要。

top_tweets.text:
Role-specific plugins in Codex are built around the work teams actually do.

Plugins for Data Analytics, Creative Production, and Product Design give Codex the tools and context to create reports, creative directions, and prototypes.

Built and used by OpenAI teams. https://t.co/U0c3qfWJxK
top_tweets.author: OpenAIDevs
top_tweets.name: OpenAI Developers
top_tweets.summary_zh: OpenAI Codex 針對不同團隊角色（數據分析、創意製作、產品設計）打造專屬插件，提供工具與情境來產出報告、創意方向和原型，由 OpenAI 內部團隊開發使用。

top_tweets.text:
🚨 Karpathy was right. He warned that 90% of AI advice dies in 6 months.

Spoiler: most tools won't even survive 90 days.

What actually compounds?
> Context engineering
> Tool design
> Orchestrator-subagent patterns
> Eval discipline
> MCP as the protocol layer
> The harness https://t.co/x3uB4CDMiR
top_tweets.author: DataChaz
top_tweets.name: Charly Wargnier
top_tweets.summary_zh: 引述 Karpathy 警告：90% 的 AI 建議 6 個月後失效。真正有長期價值的是 context engineering、工具設計、orchestrator-subagent 模式、評估紀律、MCP 協定層等基礎能力。

top_tweets.text:
Carolyn Davidson was a graphic design student at Portland State University when Phil Knight, who was then teaching accounting part-time, asked her to create a logo for his fledgling shoe company.

She billed the project at $2 per hour and received a total of $35 for her work. The https://t.co/cle0bDhpeF

criteria.score_formula: likes（主要）+ Claude 人工過濾廣告/招聘/meme/非設計
claude_filter_rules: 排除純廣告、招聘文（有洞見的 JD 除外）
排除與產品設計/PM 無關（crypto、體育、政治等）
排除 meme/搞笑但無內容
偏好有觀點的原創內容
